assertions.expectation: Proposes a phased rollout: dev first, then staging, then prod
assertions.reason: Strategy clearly defines Phase 1 (Dev), Phase 2 (Staging), Phase 3 (Prod) with explicit ordering

assertions.expectation: Includes soak time between environment phases (e.g., 24-48 hours for dev, 1 week for staging before prod)
assertions.reason: Includes 1 hour between dev cluster upgrades, 2 hours between staging clusters, 24 hours monitoring in prod, and 48 hours between prod clusters

assertions.expectation: Defines go/no-go criteria between phases (error rates, latency, pod health)
assertions.reason: Includes validation steps checking pod status, running staging tests with job completion criteria, and comprehensive health checks

assertions.expectation: Addresses version availability differences across channels (1.30 may be on Rapid but not yet on Stable)
assertions.reason: While it mentions the different channels (Rapid, Regular, Stable), it doesn't address potential version availability differences or timing constraints

assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading sequentially within each environment (1.28→1.29→1.30)
assertions.reason: Explicitly shows two-step upgrade process: first upgrading to 1.29, then to 1.30 with wait times between major upgrades

assertions.expectation: Suggests not upgrading all prod clusters simultaneously — do one or two first as canary
assertions.reason: Production strategy upgrades clusters sequentially with 48-hour gaps between each cluster, effectively using each as a canary

assertions.expectation: Includes rollback triggers and criteria for halting the rollout
assertions.reason: Includes rollback procedures, validation failure stops (exit 1), and comprehensive backup/restore mechanisms

assertions.expectation: Provides a timeline or schedule estimate for the full rollout
assertions.reason: Includes detailed timeline table showing Week 1 (Dev), Week 2 (Staging), Week 3-4 (Prod) with specific cluster counts

assertions.expectation: Mentions maintenance window coordination across clusters
assertions.reason: Mentions maintenance windows in production section and includes maintenance window notifications in the production upgrade script
